name: gogcli-mcp-sheets
description: Extended Google Sheets for Claude via gogcli — all base tools plus full Sheets support

gog_account.title: Google Account
gog_account.description: Default Google account email (optional — uses gogcli's configured default if omitted)

gog_path.title: gog Executable Path
gog_path.description: Path to the gog executable (optional — defaults to 'gog' on your PATH)

tools.name: gog_auth_add
tools.description: Authorize a Google account via browser-based OAuth

tools.name: gog_auth_list
tools.description: List all Google accounts stored in gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_status
tools.description: Show gogcli auth configuration (keyring, credential files)

tools.name: gog_auth_services
tools.description: List Google services and OAuth scopes supported by gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_run
tools.description: Run any gog auth subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_gmail_search
tools.description: Search Gmail threads by query

tools.name: gog_gmail_get
tools.description: Get a Gmail message by ID

tools.name: gog_gmail_send
tools.description: Send an email

tools.name: gog_gmail_run
tools.description: Run any gog gmail subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_calendar_events
tools.description: List calendar events with optional filters

tools.name: gog_calendar_get
tools.description: Get a specific calendar event

tools.name: gog_calendar_create
tools.description: Create a calendar event

tools.name: gog_calendar_update
tools.description: Update an existing calendar event

tools.name: gog_calendar_delete
tools.description: Delete a calendar event

tools.name: gog_calendar_respond
tools.description: Respond to a calendar event invitation

tools.name: gog_calendar_run
tools.description: Run any gog calendar subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_drive_ls
tools.description: List files in a Google Drive folder

tools.name: gog_drive_search
tools.description: Search Google Drive files

tools.name: gog_drive_get
tools.description: Get Google Drive file metadata

tools.name: gog_drive_mkdir
tools.description: Create a folder in Google Drive

tools.name: gog_drive_rename
tools.description: Rename a file or folder in Google Drive

tools.name: gog_drive_move
tools.description: Move a file to a different folder

tools.name: gog_drive_delete
tools.description: Move a file to trash

tools.name: gog_drive_share
tools.description: Share a file or folder

tools.name: gog_drive_run
tools.description: Run any gog drive subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_tasks_lists
tools.description: List all Google Task lists

tools.name: gog_tasks_list
tools.description: List tasks in a task list

tools.name: gog_tasks_get
tools.description: Get a specific task

tools.name: gog_tasks_add
tools.description: Add a task to a task list

tools.name: gog_tasks_done
tools.description: Mark a task as completed

tools.name: gog_tasks_delete
tools.description: Delete a task

tools.name: gog_tasks_run
tools.description: Run any gog tasks subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_contacts_search
tools.description: Search Google Contacts

tools.name: gog_contacts_list
tools.description: List all Google Contacts

tools.name: gog_contacts_get
tools.description: Get a contact by resource name

tools.name: gog_contacts_create
tools.description: Create a new Google Contact

tools.name: gog_contacts_run
tools.description: Run any gog contacts subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_docs_info
tools.description: Get Google Doc metadata (title, ID, properties)

tools.name: gog_docs_cat
tools.description: Read a Google Doc as plain text

tools.name: gog_docs_create
tools.description: Create a new Google Doc

tools.name: gog_docs_write
tools.description: Write or append text content to a Google Doc

tools.name: gog_docs_find_replace
tools.description: Find and replace text in a Google Doc

tools.name: gog_docs_structure
tools.description: Show document structure with numbered paragraphs

tools.name: gog_docs_run
tools.description: Run any gog docs subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_sheets_get
tools.description: Read values from a Google Sheets range

tools.name: gog_sheets_update
tools.description: Write values to a Google Sheets range

tools.name: gog_sheets_append
tools.description: Append rows to a Google Sheet

tools.name: gog_sheets_clear
tools.description: Clear values in a Google Sheets range

tools.name: gog_sheets_metadata
tools.description: Get spreadsheet metadata (title, tabs, named ranges)

tools.name: gog_sheets_create
tools.description: Create a new Google Spreadsheet

tools.name: gog_sheets_find_replace
tools.description: Find and replace text across a spreadsheet

tools.name: gog_sheets_run
tools.description: Run any gog sheets subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_sheets_add_tab
tools.description: Add a new sheet tab to a spreadsheet.

tools.name: gog_sheets_delete_tab
tools.description: Delete a sheet tab from a spreadsheet.

tools.name: gog_sheets_rename_tab
tools.description: Rename a sheet tab.

tools.name: gog_sheets_copy
tools.description: Copy a spreadsheet to a new spreadsheet with the given title.

tools.name: gog_sheets_export
tools.description: Export a spreadsheet as CSV, TSV, or PDF.

tools.name: gog_sheets_freeze
tools.description: Freeze rows and/or columns in a sheet.

tools.name: gog_sheets_insert
tools.description: Insert rows or columns into a sheet.

tools.name: gog_sheets_merge
tools.description: Merge cells in a range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_unmerge
tools.description: Unmerge previously merged cells in a range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_format
tools.description: Apply cell formatting (bold, colors, alignment, etc.) to a range. Pass format as a JSON CellFormat object.

tools.name: gog_sheets_number_format
tools.description: Set number format on a range (currency, percentage, date, etc.).

tools.name: gog_sheets_read_format
tools.description: Read cell formatting for a range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_resize_columns
tools.description: Resize column widths. Use --auto for auto-fit or --width for a specific pixel width.

tools.name: gog_sheets_resize_rows
tools.description: Resize row heights. Use --auto for auto-fit or --height for a specific pixel height.

tools.name: gog_sheets_notes
tools.description: Read cell notes in a range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_update_note
tools.description: Add, update, or clear a cell note. Pass an empty string to clear the note.

tools.name: gog_sheets_links
tools.description: List hyperlinks in a range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_named_ranges_list
tools.description: List all named ranges in a spreadsheet.

tools.name: gog_sheets_named_ranges_get
tools.description: Get a named range by name or ID.

tools.name: gog_sheets_named_ranges_add
tools.description: Create a new named range.

tools.name: gog_sheets_named_ranges_update
tools.description: Update a named range (change its name, range, or both).

tools.name: gog_sheets_named_ranges_delete
tools.description: Delete a named range.
